custom.notes: Custom endpoints stay gateway-only until a curated product profile exists.

minimax-intl-anthropic-coding.notes: MiniMax Anthropic-compatible endpoint supports the Claude lane; verified with the current MiniMax-M3 model.

minimax-intl-openai-general.notes: MiniMax OpenAI-compatible endpoint supports the Responses wire required by the Codex sidecar.

zai-shared-anthropic-coding.notes: Z.AI Anthropic-compatible endpoint supports the Claude lane; Z.AI OpenAI-compatible endpoints remain gateway-only because they are chat-completions only.

zai-shared-openai-coding.notes: Z.AI OpenAI-compatible coding endpoint is chat-completions only; do not route it through the Codex sidecar.

zai-shared-openai-general.notes: Z.AI OpenAI-compatible general endpoint is chat-completions only; do not route it through the Codex sidecar.
